name: Wilted Green Beans with Basil
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 500°F.
2. In a large bowl, toss all the ingredients until the beans are well coated.
3. Place on a non-stick baking sheet in one layer (use more than one sheet if necessary).
4. Roast for 10 minutes, stirring once.
5. Serve at room temperature garnished with the bell pepper slices.
